boundary_binding.action_boundary: May order operations release the tax-exempt sale?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Sale may proceed only when all exemption elements are confirmed before execution
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: WARN-JAD-090 warning about stale certificates and required status verification is unsatisfied; policy STD-JAD-090-P requires exemption-status class confirmation before sale
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: WARN-JAD-090 warning remains unresolved; exemption-status class not verified per STD-JAD-090-P requirement
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: CERT-JAD-090 covers all material elements (buyer, state, category, date, TX-44), but WARN-JAD-090 explicitly flags exemption-status class verification as pending before execution

final_answer: Sale cannot proceed. While CERT-JAD-090 confirms Jade University, Texas, lab equipment, TX-44, and sale date, WARN-JAD-090 explicitly flags stale-certificate status requiring exemption-status class verification before execution. STD-JAD-090-P requires this verification before sale. Releasing before WARN-JAD-090 is resolved would violate the source-boundary policy timing requirement.
open_blockers: WARN-JAD-090 exemption-status verification requirement unsatisfied before execution
